data.title: O'Shaughnessy Ventures Funds Researcher Classifying Chronic Pain
data.description: Alex Araki has been granted an O'Shaughnessy Fellowship by O'Shaughnessy Ventures LLC (OSV) in Greenwich, Conn. The fellowship aims to support the development of the initial diagnostic test capable of distinguishing various forms of chronic pain. This groundbreaking initiative was announced on July 2, 2026.

data.title: Center for Behavior Analysis Welcomes Palm Beach Gardens Community to New Facility Open House and Ribbon-Cutting Ceremony
data.description: On July 2, 2026, in Palm Beach Gardens, Florida, the Center for Behavior Analysis (CBA) announced the launch of its expanded therapeutic facility to serve the local community. A special event including an open house and ribbon-cutting ceremony took place on June 6 to mark this occasion.

data.title: Cannabix Technologies Announces Detection of Methamphetamine and Amphetamine in Human Breath
data.description: Cannabix Technologies Inc. has identified an important new opportunity with the detection of methamphetamine and amphetamine in breath. This development marks a significant advancement for the company, as it expands its capabilities beyond traditional detection methods. By leveraging breath analysis technology, Cannabix Technologies Inc. is now able to detect these substances with improved accuracy and efficiency. This breakthrough showcases the potential for the company to tap into the market for drug detection, which has a growing demand. With this new capability, Cannabix Technologies Inc. is poised to capitalize on this opportunity and establish itself as a key player in the industry.

data.title: Rivian Releases Q2 2026 Production and Delivery Figures, Raises Full Year Delivery Outlook and Sets Date for Second Quarter 2026 Financial Results
data.description: Rivian Automotive, Inc., based in Irvine, California, shared their production and delivery figures for the quarter ending June 30, 2026. During this period, the company manufactured 12,613 vehicles at their facility in Normal, Illinois and successfully delivered 12,194 vehicles. These delivery numbers exceeded Rivian's initial forecast of 9,000 to 11,000 vehicles for the quarter. This higher performance was attributed to the strong growth seen quarter-over-quarter in their electric delivery vans (EDV) and R1 models, along with the commencement of R2 deliveries.

data.title: NUBURU Issues Letter to Shareholders on Transformation Plan Execution, Initial Revenue Generation and Industrial Platform Build-Out
data.description: DENVER--In a recent announcement, NUBURU, Inc. (NYSE American: BURU), a dual-use Defense & Security integrated platform company, shared a letter to shareholders from Alessandro Zamboni, Executive Chairman and Co-Chief Executive Officer. Zamboni emphasized the significant transformation of NUBURU over the past year, highlighting its evolution from a company with limited scope to a diversified entity. The letter underscores the importance of clear communication amidst market distractions. Shareholders were directly addressed in the communication, demonstrating a transparent approach by the company.

data.title: End Child Poverty California Commends Key Elements of Governor Newsom's Final Budget to Ensure Wealthy Corporations Pay Their Fair Share, Calls on Lawmakers to Do More to Protect Children and Families
data.description: In Sacramento, California on July 2, 2026, End Child Poverty California (ECPCA) has praised certain components of the 2026–27 state budget recently approved by outgoing Gov. Gavin Newsom. The budget incorporates fresh revenue streams and capitalizes on a more optimistic budget projection for the year…

data.title: Music Market Watch Launches to Help Independent Artists Navigate the Future of Music
data.description: As of July 2, 2026, a new platform has been introduced in Miami to support artists by offering industry insights, strategic guidance, artist discovery opportunities, and access to trusted resources. Music Market Watch has officially launched to provide these services and aims to create a growing ecosystem for artists.

data.title: TransportBPO Brings 24/7 Outsourced Dispatch and Call Center Support to Transportation Companies Across North America, the UK and Australia
data.description: A specialized BPO firm is now providing staffing services for taxi, NEMT, chauffeur, courier, and trucking operators by supplying trained dispatchers and virtual agents at a significantly reduced cost compared to handling in-house. This service was launched in Vancouver, Washington on July 2, 2026. The BPO firm's solution allows transportation operators to have their phones attended to 24/7 without the high expenses that come with internal staffing.

data.title: Elegance Library Launches the "99-Day Soul Rebuild" Challenge with Monthly Cash Prizes Alongside the Free Global Release of "99 Best Stories"
data.description: In Al Hofuf, Saudi Arabia, on July 2, 2026, Elegance Library introduced a transformative initiative aiming to address emotional struggles faced by millions globally. This initiative, named the "99-Day Soul Rebuild" Challenge, signifies a shift towards utilizing reading as a tool for active healing. The challenge is designed to promote positive change and offers participants an opportunity to engage in a structured program for rejuvenating their inner selves over the course of 99 days.

data.title: PermitUsNow Recognized as 2026 Professional Services Champion at Subcontractors USA's Top 25 Prime & Subcontractor Awards
data.description: A leading firm specializing in permitting services has been acknowledged for its role in streamlining project timelines for stakeholders in Texas. PermitUsNow, a consulting firm in Texas focused on permitting and regulatory compliance, was awarded in 2026 for their contributions.

data.title: China Yuchai International to Pay US$0.87 Per Share Cash Dividend for FY2025
data.description: Singapore, July 2, 2026 - China Yuchai International Limited (NYSE: CYD) disclosed a cash dividend of US$0.87 per ordinary share for the fiscal year concluding on December 31, 2025. This announcement was made by the company's Board of Directors.

data.title: A Love Letter to Paris: Mathieu Bitton Brings Paris Blues to Chicago
data.description: The Leica Store & Gallery in Chicago is currently showcasing a renowned exhibition titled "Paris Blues," which includes both iconic photographs and new works made specifically for its debut in Chicago. The exhibition will run through a significant date, July 2, 2026. This event marks the prideful moment for the Leica Store & Gallery as they introduce this acclaimed display to the Chicago audience.

data.title: Hanbat National University Researchers Develop a New Predictive Model for Designing 2D Perovskites
data.description: A recent study conducted in South Korea in July 2, 2026, has provided valuable insights into tuning excitons in 2D perovskites. By isolating dielectric-screening effects from structural distortion, the study offers practical design guidelines. This research is significant in the field of optoelectronics, where 2D perovskites are gaining traction. These findings are crucial for the development of new materials and technologies.

data.title: Maynards Announces Two Global Webcast Auctions Featuring Manufacturing Assets from Natural Fiber Welding, Inc.
data.description: A global leader in industrial asset auctions and advisory services, Maynards Group of Companies, based in Peoria, Illinois, revealed plans for two upcoming webcast auctions. The auctions will showcase surplus manufacturing and laboratory assets from Natural Fiber Welding, Inc. (NFW), an international company. The announcement was made on July 2, 2026, through a press release on PRNewswire.

data.title: Xperteks Computer Consultancy, Inc. Named to 2026 MSP 501, the Technology Industry's Most Prestigious Ranking of Global Managed Service Providers
data.description: Xperteks Computer Consultancy, Inc., a New York-based Apple Authorized Reseller and managed IT services provider, has recently been recognized as one of the top companies in the managed services industry in the annual MSP 501 list. The list, which was released on July 2, 2026, showcases the best companies in the industry, with Xperteks Computer Consultancy, Inc. securing a prestigious spot. This acknowledgment highlights the company's commitment to excellence and distinction in the field, further solidifying its reputation as a leading player in the market.
